ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., city, state) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station in decimal degrees */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station in decimal degrees */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "station_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "minimum_air_temperature" REAL /* Minimum air temperature in Kelvin */,
  "maximum_air_temperature" REAL /* Maximum air temperature in Kelvin */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Precipitation amount in millimeters */,
  "tdtr" REAL /* Temperature diurnal range (TDTR) in Kelvin */,
  "tavg" REAL /* Average temperature in Kelvin */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in Watts per square meter */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_weather_data" (
  "weekly_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the weekly data */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week of the year */,
  "avg_min_temp" REAL /* Average minimum air temperature for the week in Kelvin */,
  "avg_max_temp" REAL /* Average maximum air temperature for the week in Kelvin */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation amount for the week in millimeters */,
  "avg_tdtr" REAL /* Average temperature diurnal range (TDTR) for the week in Kelvin */,
  "avg_tavg" REAL /* Average temperature for the week in Kelvin */,
  "avg_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the week in meters per second */,
  "avg_solar_radiation" REAL /* Average solar radiation for the week in Watts per square meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekly_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_weather_data" (
  "yearly_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the yearly data */,
  "avg_min_temp" REAL /* Average minimum air temperature for the year in Kelvin */,
  "avg_max_temp" REAL /* Average maximum air temperature for the year in Kelvin */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation amount for the year in millimeters */,
  "avg_tdtr" REAL /* Average temperature diurnal range (TDTR) for the year in Kelvin */,
  "avg_tavg" REAL /* Average temperature for the year in Kelvin */,
  "avg_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the year in meters per second */,
  "avg_solar_radiation" REAL /* Average solar radiation for the year in Watts per square meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearly_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., text, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Detailed description of changes made to the data in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_category" TEXT /* Category of the annotation (e.g., error, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project participant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
